NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​LocalFileDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUpdateDownloader
IDisposable
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​LocalFileDownloader

Class that downloads files from local sources and reports progress on those files being downloaded.

_logger
private ILogger? _logger
_cancellationTokenSource
private CancellationTokenSource _cancellationTokenSource
_downloadFileLocation
private string _downloadFileLocation
Functions
LocalFileDownloader
public LocalFileDownloader()

Default constructor for the local file downloader.

LocalFileDownloader
public LocalFileDownloader(
ILogger? 
logger
)

Default constructor for the local file downloader.  Uses default credentials and default proxy.

logger
ILogger?

ILogger to write logs to

get;

UseLocalUriPath
public bool UseLocalUriPath {
get;
set
}

When handling the string url in StartFileDownload, use Uri.LocalPath as the path to read text from.
